notes: The six BBSes the sysop circle maintains. Per _COMMUNITY_PLANNED_SPEC.md §The BBS layer. RUST_CODE / OVERPASS / CALICHE / DRY_BLOOM / BEDROCK are in the public directory from W1. SNACKS rotates dial-ups and never appears in the public directory; Frasier was readmitted W2 after the friendly intervention ban. The player learns SNACKS's W2 dial-up via WIRE_MOTHER's DM.

bbses.name: RUST_CODE.BBS
bbses.flavor: The busiest. Dense with prehistory. The board the rest of the network treats as the hub.

bbses.name: OVERPASS.BBS
bbses.masthead_ascii:
___
                          ___( o )___
                       O V E R P A S S
            ────────────  bell-buoy  ────────────
            steeple @ mobile · gulf coast · 9600 baud
bbses.flavor: Gulf-coast nautical. Slower posts, deeper threads. Bellbuoy in the masthead. STEEPLE uses the keel-keeper register for the W11 glossary.

bbses.name: CALICHE.BBS
bbses.flavor: West Texas dust register. The matriarch's board. The original demon-binding code lives in a sticky thread here, pinned for fifteen years. WIRE_MOTHER uses the foal register.

bbses.name: DRY_BLOOM.BBS
bbses.flavor: Brief, beautiful, intermittent. Posts in seasons. Some of the network's best ASCII art. PALOMINO uses the second-light register.

bbses.name: BEDROCK.BBS
bbses.flavor: Queries only. Every post is a question. The masthead is a single fossil in a slab of shale. The most paranoid board in the circle. THE_QUARRY uses the layer register.

bbses.name: SNACKS
bbses.masthead_ascii:
snacks
  ──────
  inside jokes only · no ANSI · no MIDI · 2400 baud
  the circle's living room since 1992
bbses.flavor: The friendly, plain-text refuge. Frasier was banned for a week before the game opens (WIRE_MOTHER's intervention); readmitted W2 via DM. Once readmitted the dial number rotates by convention.
